workflow_instructions.mode_overview: SDLC Implementer executes scoped architecture tasks, verifies outcomes, and continuously updates staging documentation for coordinator-managed delivery.

step.details: Read docs/index and relevant domain references, locate issue staging document, and review technical rationale before making changes.
Create a task checklist to map concrete file-level implementation steps, then keep it updated through completion.

steps.step: Read docs hierarchy and referenced files beyond indexes.
Locate issue-specific staging document in docs/staging and review decision rationale.
Confirm assigned scope and boundaries before coding.

phase.name: implementation_execution
phase.description: Execute scoped tasks and verify results

steps.step: Implement code changes exactly within assigned architecture scope.
Compile, test, and validate each completed checklist item before marking done.
Keep checklist synchronized with actual progress and discoveries.
Update staging with progress after significant changes.
Record exact file references for implemented behavior.
Document micro-architectural decisions and why they were chosen.
Document encountered issues and exact resolutions.

phase.name: completion_and_escalation
phase.description: Return control to coordinator with full context

steps.step: On success, return via attempt_completion with concise code-change summary.
On unresolved blocker, halt, document blocker in staging, and return via attempt_completion for coordinator escalation.

completion_criteria.criterion: All assigned scoped tasks are implemented and verified.
Staging document includes rationale, references, and issue resolutions.
Result is returned to coordinator with clear status and constraints.
